The ribbon has a wire edge, which will allow you to keep the bow in perfect shape around the gifts and holiday decor
You can use the glitter mesh ribbon to make elaborate bows to gift boxes, wreaths, bouquets, Christmas tree, windows, doors, walls, stairs, fences, fireplaces and other places
Featuring a shimmering glittery netting texture, adds the perfect touch of elegance and glamour to any occasion
